test.name: MFRTT01 - Verify whether able to add line profiler tool in image viewer

kw.name: Launch Application
kw.doc: Launches an application.

kw.name: Attach Application By Pid
kw.doc: Attach to a running application by pid.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until element is enabled or timeout was reached. If timeout was reached an FlaUIError occurred.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Exist
kw.doc: Waits until element exist or timeout was reached. If timeout was reached an FlaUIError occurred.

kw.name: Set Text To Textbox
kw.doc: Inputs value to a textbox module.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Set Text To Textbox
kw.doc: Inputs value to a textbox module.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Left click to element by an XPath.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Focus
kw.doc: Try to focus element by given xpath.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Exist
kw.doc: Waits until element exist or timeout was reached. If timeout was reached an FlaUIError occurred.

kw.name: Invoke Button
kw.doc: Invokes the invokable element given by identifier. If button could not be found by xpath False will be returned.

kw.name: Focus
kw.doc: Try to focus element by given xpath.

kw.name: Win Move
kw.doc: method WinMove

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Keyword Succeeds
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.

kw.name: Element Should Exist
kw.doc: Checks if element exists. If element exists True will be returned otherwise False. If element could not be found by xpath False will be returned.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Exist
kw.doc: Waits until element exist or timeout was reached. If timeout was reached an FlaUIError occurred.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Left click to element by an XPath.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Set Text To Textbox
kw.doc: Inputs value to a textbox module.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Left click to element by an XPath.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until element is enabled or timeout was reached. If timeout was reached an FlaUIError occurred.

kw.name: Add Line Profiler Tool
kw.doc: Activate the Line Profiler tool and draw it on the image viewer.

kw.name: Focus
kw.doc: Try to focus element by given xpath.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Left click to element by an XPath.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Mouse Click Drag
kw.doc: method MouseClickDrag

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the whole desktop or the element, from the optionally provided identifier. Returns screenshot depending on log mode. Screenshot mode File -> returns filepath Screenshot mode Base64 -> returns encoded base64 string of image

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Move File
kw.doc: Moves the source file into the destination.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Exist
kw.doc: Waits until element exist or timeout was reached. If timeout was reached an FlaUIError occurred.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the whole desktop or the element, from the optionally provided identifier. Returns screenshot depending on log mode. Screenshot mode File -> returns filepath Screenshot mode Base64 -> returns encoded base64 string of image

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Move File
kw.doc: Moves the source file into the destination.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Compare Images
kw.doc: Module-level wrapper so Robot Framework can use `Compare Images` keyword. Returns True if images are identical, False otherwise.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Compare Images
kw.doc: Module-level wrapper so Robot Framework can use `Compare Images` keyword. Returns True if images are identical, False otherwise.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.doc: Left click to element by an XPath.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Add Annotation at custom position
kw.doc: Add annotation of specified type using user-provided start and end positions relative to the image viewer's top-left corner. Supported types: Arrow, Ruler, Line

kw.doc: Selects item from combobox with given name. Combobox will be automatic collapsed after selection is done.

kw.doc: Waits until element exist or timeout was reached. If timeout was reached an FlaUIError occurred.

kw.name: Take Screenshot

test.name: MFRTT11 - Verify whether able to Reset zoom on surface plot 3D image to default state by clicking on Reset View button.

kw.name: Zoom Surface Plot 3D Image
kw.doc: Zoom surface plot 3D image. Positive values zoom in and negative values zoom out.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Directory
kw.doc: Creates the specified directory.

kw.name: Move File
kw.doc: Moves the source file into the destination.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Continue On Failure
kw.doc: Runs the keyword and continues execution even if a failure occurs.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Compare Images
kw.doc: Module-level wrapper so Robot Framework can use `Compare Images` keyword. Returns True if images are identical, False otherwise.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: Verify whether able to Reset zoom on surface plot 3D image to default state by clicking on Reset View button.

test.name: MFRTT12 - Verify whether able to Zoom in and Zoom out on surface plot 3D image.

kw.name: Zoom Surface Plot 3D Image
kw.doc: Zoom surface plot 3D image. Positive values zoom in and negative values zoom out.

kw.name: Focus
kw.doc: Try to focus element by given xpath.

kw.name: Click Surface Plot Window Fit View Button
kw.doc: Click Surface Plot Window Fit View Button.

kw.name: Focus
kw.doc: Try to focus element by given xpath.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Left click to element by an XPath.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click
kw.doc: Left click to element by an XPath.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Convert To Integer
kw.doc: Converts the given item to an integer number.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Variable If
kw.doc: Sets variable based on the given condition.

kw.name: Mouse Wheel
kw.doc: method MouseWheel

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Exist
kw.doc: Waits until element exist or timeout was reached. If timeout was reached an FlaUIError occurred.

kw.name: Take Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the whole desktop or the element, from the optionally provided identifier. Returns screenshot depending on log mode. Screenshot mode File -> returns filepath Screenshot mode Base64 -> returns encoded base64 string of image

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

test.name: MFRTT13 - Verify whether able to Rotate surface plot 3D image.

kw.name: Rotate Surface Plot 3D Image
kw.doc: Rotate surface plot 3D image by right-click dragging on the viewer using user-provided start and end coordinates.

kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the whole desktop or the element, from the optionally provided identifier. Returns screenshot depending on log mode. Screenshot mode File -> returns filepath Screenshot mode Base64 -> returns encoded base64 string of image
